control.already_running: a supervised run is already active
control.missing_target: no project selected — choose a target project first
control.cr_not_decidable: this change request cannot be decided right now
control.unknown_staging: this import staging session is unknown or expired — restage the documents
control.cycle_state: the spec-cycle state does not allow this — check the cycle status (open/closed) and retry the matching action

upload.not_verified: this upload has not been verified yet
upload.would_overwrite: placing these files would overwrite existing ones

scaffold.not_a_directory: target path is not a directory

fsBrowse.unsafe: folder name does not resolve to a direct child
fsBrowse.exists: a file or folder with that name already exists here

project.not_governed: This folder doesn't seem to be governed by Vivicy — it has no .vivicy directory.

layoutSave.invalid_payload: the layout save request is malformed
layoutSave.patch_failed: could not apply the layout patch
layoutSave.regen_failed: the map could not be regenerated

route.settings_body_not_object: settings body must be a JSON object
route.skills_ids_invalid: ids must be an array of skill id strings
route.notifications_body_invalid: body must be '{' id: string '}' or '{' all: true '}'
route.map_layout_invalid_json: Request body must be valid JSON.
route.map_not_json: architecture map is not valid JSON
route.map_bad_shape: architecture map has an unexpected shape
